title: Energy business, used car business, and plain ol’ business business
summary: Today’s episode of Quick Charge means business – the business of buying up power stations to power up the pet AI that says it would have picked you over Michael Jordan in the 1984 NBA draft and the business of fleecing well-heeled car collectors out of an extra $100,000 on a (mostly) new Tesla Model S Signature sedan.

title: Solar just became Europe’s biggest source of electricity – here’s the milestone it hit
summary: Solar power reached a new milestone across Europe last month, generating a record 52 terawatt-hours (TWh) of electricity and supplying 25% of all electricity used in the European Union in June 2026, according to new analysis from energy think tank Ember.

title: Volvo wants to launch two new EVs in the US priced around $50,000, and they are not SUVs
summary: Volvo is pulling its last wagon from the US, but it may not be for long. As it aims to revamp the brand, Volvo may bring two new EVs to America, starting in the low $50,000s.

title: Lamborghini says EV tech ‘not mature enough,’ pushes first EV past 2030
summary:
Lamborghini has doubled down on backing away from electric vehicles. A second executive now confirms the Lanzador will launch as a plug-in hybrid rather than an EV, and that the brand’s first fully electric car won’t arrive until after 2030.

The reason, according to the company, is that its customers “were not willing to buy an electric car” and that the “technology is not mature enough.”

title: Hyundai cuts IONIQ 5 N EV prices by $6,300
summary: Hyundai slashed prices on the all-electric 2026 IONIQ 5 N by $6,300, making it more affordable than ever.

title: Exclusive two-day-only 58% savings on EcoFlow and Jackery power stations from $95, Aiper HydroComm 5-in-1 pool monitor, more
summary:
Our mid-week Green Deals are enjoying some Prime Day-like savings that will be running for the next two days as part of the Wellbots Days 13th Anniversary Sale + an exclusive 13% off sitewide bonus savings code. The first collection is on a handful of EcoFlow power stations, like the 4,096Wh DELTA Pro 3 Portable Power Station down at an exclusive $2,261 for the lowest price we have seen since April, among others. We also have a massive lineup of exclusive Jackery deals, like the new HomePower 2000 Plus V2 Portable Power Station sitting $14 above its Prime Day pricing. From there, we spotted Aiper’s HydroComm Smart Pool Monitor bundle at $90 off, the EGO Power+ 56V 15-inch Cordless Electric POWERLOAD String Trimmer back at its Amazon low, and much more. As always, you can find all the hangover deals down at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s first-ever $450 discount on the new Segway Myon Smart e-bike, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: Hyundai opens $5 billion battery plant as it pushes to become America’s #2 EV brand
summary: Hyundai opened the doors to its latest EV battery plant, a $5 billion joint facility with SK On.

title: Tesla’s LFP battery holds its charge better, study says
summary:
A new analysis of nearly 10,000 real-world EV battery tests found that the same Tesla Model 3 holds up very differently depending on which battery it was built with — and the cheaper LFP version comes out on top.

The Model 3 with CATL’s lithium iron phosphate (LFP) pack averaged 93.3% battery health among cars that had driven more than 62,000 miles, beating every nickel-based version of the car in the dataset.

title: Kia reveals another low-cost EV that we’ll sadly never get to see
summary: The new Syros arrives as Kia’s most affordable EV in India, with a best-in-class charging time and a range of up to 326 miles (526 km).

title: GMC marks 25 years of Hummer with limited ‘ICON’ EV as sales sink 55%
summary:
GMC is marking 25 years of the Hummer nameplate with the Hummer EV ICON | 25, a limited-run edition of its all-electric supertruck that revives the yellow paint of the original H2.

The tribute arrives at an awkward moment: Hummer EV sales fell nearly 55% in the first half of 2026 as demand for pricey electric trucks cooled.

title: Volvo Could Bring An Electric Sedan And Wagon To U.S. By 2028: Report
summary: Volvo is reportedly considering bringing a sedan and wagon back to the U.S. as EVs, after discontinuing its gas-powered models.

title: EV Startup Reveals $15,000 25-MPH Car That You'll Never Have To Park
summary: Chip Motors is a new EV startup betting that Americans are willing to go smaller—and pay up to have someone else do the parking.

title: Someone Is Already Trying To Flip One Of The Last Tesla Model S's Built. The Price Is... Ambitious
summary: Is owning the last of the breed worth an extra $100,000? One enterprising dealer is trying to find out.

title: This Tesla Model 3 Battery Chemistry Ages Better Than The Rest
summary: Four Model 3 battery variants were compared after 62,000 miles, and the CATL LFP pack retained the most of its initial capacity.

title: America Lost Over 111,000 Jobs Due To Trump's Clean Energy Pullback
summary: After Trump reversed Biden-era incentives, 223 clean-energy programs were ended, resulting in $82.9 billion in investments lost.

title: 'Completely False': Lucid Denies Report That It's Weighing Bankruptcy After Shares Crash
summary: A report that Lucid was considering bankruptcy triggered a massive selloff and an official denial from the automaker.

title: Nearly 10,000 EVs Were Tested For Battery Degradation. These 2 Models Won Out.
summary: A Swedish analysis of nearly 10,000 battery tests found that two EVs retained more than 97% of their capacity after 62,000 miles.

title: The Company Behind TikTok Could Get Into The Autonomous Car Race: Report
summary: TikTok's parent company is more massive than you might think, it's reportedly eyeing up self-driving.

title: This New EV Range Extender Skips Gas And Packs A New Kind Of Generator
summary: The electric motor on Horse Powertrain’s D20 range extender is smaller and more powerful than conventional generators.

title: This Tiny Electric Kia Camper Somehow Sleeps Four
summary: The PV5 LightCamp packs two beds, a removable kitchen, and rooftop sleeping space into one remarkably compact electric van.
